message: .devlyn/ is not listed in .gitignore (which only contains node_modules, dist, *.log), so every pipeline reporter artifact under .devlyn/ -- including this gate's own build_gate.findings.jsonl / build_gate.log.md and spec-verify-check.py's spec-verify.json / spec-verify.results.json / spec-verify-findings.jsonl, plus prior-phase artifacts (plan.md, criteria.generated.md, goal.txt, engines.json, implement.stdout/stderr) -- shows up as untracked in `git status`.
fix_hint: Add a `.devlyn/` line to .gitignore so pipeline/reporter artifacts stop leaking into git status.
